{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201657364E371FE7199D190CCA22"}"},"total":2957},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7452377076646118206","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真心觉得剧情很不错，伏笔很多，主角也超级有魅力，今年伪人文看多了，这本书真的让人眼前一亮，而且也越来越好奇后续的发展了，作者大大加油！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1735147970,"group_id":"7377414197526662206","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"头好痛…原来是脑子被丢掉了◐A◐","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwvXimjKF/0VA00MyvLiWicLuW/o4XhiqUWhUJuriHe8","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/2454c8abc68144a6b831769feee0287e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776532118&x-signature=yvGDtE7%2FsWxysFs%2FekJWAhoLqq0%3D","user_id":"1225318993241220","user_name":"看世界^"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1225318993241220","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7377414197526662206","book_info":{"abstract":"（已完结）【双男主+无限流+破镜重圆+非无敌+反转+伏笔+he】
【有点暴躁经常在死亡边缘反复横跳的美人受X表面无辜心机深沉睚眦必报的绿茶攻。】
顾微，直播演绎系统一个小小的F级重犯，因把整个副本连同小助手一起炸上天而被系统流放到惩罚副本。
玩家们本以为这次出来，顾微能做一个遵纪守法的好玩家，然而释放后的第一个副本就故技重施，再次将副本炸掉，喜提二十年不用参加副本的生活。
然而只是睡了一觉，就再次回归副本。

顾微：……我只想摆烂。
系统：不，你不想。

副本时间线异常逆转，他正因为某种未知的原因一步步走向过去。
排行榜上失踪的前十玩家重新出现，主系统始终没有任何回应。
他顺着时间线走向十年前，看见了面目全非的自己。
他的手指划过冰凉的椅背，走向长桌的桌首。
系统庆贺他的归来：
【欢迎回来，亲爱的第一玩家。】

停止的时间线继续向前，顾微抬起头，看见故事的起点。
那是……
他为自己设计好的结局。
（2024.11.10修）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/3219407b121a5e9707a37a22fcf0c423","author":"惑非","author_id":"","book_id":"7377414197526662206","book_name":"F级新人？明明是第一玩家","book_short_name":"淮微","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#101010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":70,"name":"无限流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=70&name=无限流&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":475,"name":"破镜重圆","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=475&name=破镜重圆&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":484,"name":"HE","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=484&name=HE&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":757,"name":"现代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=757&name=现代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7403347640835916312","read_count":"36623","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1159641"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"543","tags":"双男主,无限流,破镜重圆,HE,现代,纯爱","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ff0ca9255813b349b7ac8794d77514ba~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779181056&x-signature=%2FER%2FimhBtdbkEpYrbb%2FHFzNZHFQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"100854303820","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"153"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201657364E371FE7199D190CCA22"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读8小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":43,"forwarded_count":0,"lis sten_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":6583,"reply_count":3,"show_pv":47644},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7515792716809634622","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看！双强！反转不断，坑填的非常完美，我听苛刻的对待这种小说。不过我可以保证这本小说不亚于《我在惊悚游戏里封神》（ky致歉没有捧杀或者对比的意思只是单纯的夸赞两个作品的完美和精彩）
不用担心狗血，因为俩小情侣都将对方刻骨铭心。主角也不是什么好人，杀伐果断，实力与美貌并存。每个配角都出其不意，看得我头皮发麻，尤其是后面填坑的时候。一个个的真相被揭露，才发现那些都藏在记忆深处，甚至就在自己的身边……（再说剧透了）
总之！力推！好看！用时3天，已完结，超好看！😘","text_exts":[{"e":127,"s":123,"text":"杀伐果断","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%9D%80%E4%BC%90%E6%9E%9C%E6%96%AD&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231773997056190CCA22%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227515792716809634622%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227377414197526662206%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%9D%80%E4%BC%90%E6%9E%9C%E6%96%AD%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1749915344,"group_id":"7377414197526662206","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"没有符合胃口的书，书荒了呜😥
